title: Brand tokens.json (Feinschliff DSL pipeline)
description: Validates a brand pack's tokens.json (DTCG-flavoured). The DSL pipeline (lib/dsl/tokens.py) requires `color`, `font-family`, and `font-size` groups; `font-weight` and `slide` have built-in defaults and are optional. Extra colors, sizes, and groups are allowed.

color.description: Color tokens. Each entry is either a hex string or a DTCG object {"$value": "#RRGGBB"}.
color.$comment: Conventional color-key vocabulary (free-form via additionalProperties; documented here so brand authors share names across packs). Phase 4 added 6 semantic colors for C-suite layouts (recommendation, risk-register, risk-matrix, roadmap): `severity-low` / `severity-medium` / `severity-high` for the risk P×I axis, and `status-done` / `status-current` / `status-next` for roadmap-style progress states. Brands SHOULD use these exact names when they ship the corresponding semantic so layouts that reach for `tokens.color['severity-high']` resolve across packs. A brand MAY omit any of them — the layouts gracefully fall back to ramp colors when a key is absent.

font-family.description: Font-family tokens. Each entry is either an array of family names or a DTCG object {"$value": ["..."]}.

font-weight.description: Optional font-weight tokens. Standard CSS weights (300..900) are used when omitted.

font-size.description: Font-size tokens. Each value is a dimension string like "160px".

slide.description: Optional slide-canvas dimensions. Defaults to a 1920x1080 canvas with 100/100/80px padding when omitted. Keys ending in '_emu' hold raw EMU integers (typically `width_emu`/`height_emu` written by brand_decompile_all.py from a source PPTX) so the emitter can match the source's physical slide size.

style.description: Reserved for future per-brand style-bundle overrides (see STYLE_BUNDLES in lib/dsl/tokens.py).

asset_sources.description: Reserved field for per-brand asset-source declarations. Accepted in tokens for forward compatibility; not consumed by the current v2 pipeline.

typography.description: Layer 1 typography tokens (display tracking curve, tabular numerals).

display_tracking_curve.description: Map of font-size threshold (px, as string) → em-relative tracking (negative shrinks).

tnum_font.description: Font face to swap to when a run's content is purely numeric (e.g. a 'Tabular' cut).

tnum_slot_keys.description: Slot keys whose runs should always activate the tabular face regardless of content shape (Layer 2 consumer).

picture_treatment.description: Per-brand default photo treatment applied at picture-fill time.

picture_duotone.description: Explicit duotone endpoints for picture treatment and brand-tinted placeholders: colour-token NAMES resolved via the brand color map (e.g. dark: ink, light: accent). Overrides the ink/paper heuristic.

locale.description: Locale tag controlling quote conventions and language-aware text moves.

chart.description: Chart-sanitation tokens consumed by Layer 2 chart layouts.

$image_provider.description: Build-time image provider for picture primitives using query:. Lookup by `kind` against the global provider registry. `config` is passed through to the provider constructor.

brief_defaults.description: Optional brand-pack-level brief priors. When present, the deck orchestrator seeds brief inference with these defaults before applying explicit user flags or heuristics. Precedence: explicit flag > user-in-prompt > brand_defaults > heuristic. All sub-properties are optional.

verbosity.description: Default verbosity tier for decks built with this brand. Matches the Verbosity Tier table in pipeline.md step 1.

image_style.description: Default image style for decks built with this brand. Matches the Image style heuristics table in pipeline.md step 1.

frame.description: Default narrative frame for decks built with this brand. Matches the narrative frame list in pipeline.md step 1.

audience.description: Default target audience for decks built with this brand. Matches audience-calibration.md.
